result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 12:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS today,
         DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months' AS start_dt
),
owner_assign AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    regexp_replace(coalesce(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(coalesce(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.today
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%%owner%%'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_assign
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> '' AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.today
  WHERE coalesce(c.ownerid,'') <> ''
  GROUP BY regexp_replace(coalesce(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '')
),
eligible AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id
  FROM handled h
  WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
)
SELECT e.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM eligible e
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = e.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, e.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS today,
         DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months' AS start_dt
),
owner_assign AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    regexp_replace(coalesce(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(coalesce(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.today
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_assign
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> '' AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.today
  WHERE coalesce(c.ownerid,'') <> ''
  GROUP BY regexp_replace(coalesce(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '')
),
eligible AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id
  FROM handled h
  WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
)
SELECT e.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM eligible e
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = e.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, e.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS today,
         TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '12 months' AS start_dt
),
owner_assign AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    regexp_replace(coalesce(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(coalesce(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.today
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_assign
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> '' AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.today
  WHERE coalesce(c.ownerid,'') <> ''
  GROUP BY regexp_replace(coalesce(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '')
),
eligible AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id
  FROM handled h
  WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
)
SELECT e.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM eligible e
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = e.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, e.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS today,
         TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '12 months' AS start_dt
),
owner_assign AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,

    regexp_replace(coalesce(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(coalesce(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.today
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_assign
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> '' AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.today
  WHERE coalesce(c.ownerid,'') <> ''
  GROUP BY regexp_replace(coalesce(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '')
),
eligible AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id
  FROM handled h
  WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
)
SELECT e.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM eligible e
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = e.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, e.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
